title: InsightsAI.com landing — free GEO SEO audit
html:
A live InsightsAI.com landing page in the wild — "Get your free GEO SEO audit. Track, analyze, and grow your local search presence across Google, Bing, and Apple Maps" — same name space Yahir picked, raising the question whether this is his or a name-collision competitor.

insight ai · aeo agency · geo seo · ai search optimization · competitor research aeo
